ddls:
CREATE TABLE "query_plans" (
  "query_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the query plan */,
  "dbms" TEXT /* Database management system used for the query (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL) */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "plan_format" TEXT /* Format of the query plan (e.g., JSON, XML, plain text) */,
  "plan_data" TEXT /* Binary data containing the query plan */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query plan was uploaded */,
  "query_exec_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query */,
  "query_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the query execution */,
  "query_size" TEXT /* Size of the query plan data in bytes */,
  "query_version" TEXT /* Version of the DBMS used */,
  "query_tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization (e.g., 'slow', 'high-impact') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization recommendation */,
  "query_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query plan the recommendation is for */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the optimization recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., 'indexing', 'query_rewrite') */,
  "recommended_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the recommendation */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recommendation is critical */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., 'pending', 'implemented') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_recommendations_recommended_by FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_recommendations_query_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_plan_id") REFERENCES query_plans ("query_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, dba) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_data" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration data entry */,
  "query_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query plan the collaboration data is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaboration data */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the discussion forum post or rating comment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration data was created */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., 'comment', 'rating') */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent post (for nested comments) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_data_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES collaboration_data ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_data_query_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_plan_id") REFERENCES query_plans ("query_plan_id")
)
